title: Sensitivity Analysis: The risk analysis measure known as sensitivity analysis examines how...
summary: Assess how sensitivity analysis evaluates the impact of changing assumptions on financial outcomes.
prompt: The risk analysis measure known as sensitivity analysis examines how different values of an independent variable affect a particular dependent variable under a given set of assumptions.
solution: Sensitivity analysis is an essential risk analysis tool that assesses the impact of changes in assumptions on the outcomes of a financial model, helping identify which variables have the most significant effect on project profitability.
